BRANCH.COMMENT: --- VE-1101 --- check periodDurationContinuance type
--- VE-1101 check status of api call ---
--- Check if current period exists--- if not then create it ---

MAP.COMMENT: --- current period exists --- so do nothing ---

SEQUENCE.NAME: $default
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: --- current period missing --- create current period ---

Values.value: Current Period not found for challenge - %challengePeriods/challengeId%

INVOKE.COMMENT: --- Get All Challenge Periods from DB ---

MAP.COMMENT: --- Sort periods in desc order of period No. to find last period ---
--- Map startDate and endDate of last period ---
--- initialize newStartDate of Current Period & period No. ---

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: --- Map Previous and Current Periods DB Doc ---

BRANCH.COMMENT: get the start and end date based on type

MAP.COMMENT: map to period Input doc for current & previous periods

BRANCH.COMMENT: get monitoring period type

MAP.COMMENT: calculate monitoring end date of current period

BRANCH.COMMENT: calculate monitoring end date of previous period if it is not null

SEQUENCE.NAME: true
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: calculate monitoring end date of previous period

MAP.COMMENT: calculate monitoring end date of previous period
calculate monitoring end date of current period

BRANCH.COMMENT: calculate monitoring end date of previous period if not null

SEQUENCE.NAME: true
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: calculate monitoring end date of previous period

MAP.COMMENT: calculate monitoring end date of current period

BRANCH.COMMENT: calculate monitoring end date of previous period if not null

SEQUENCE.NAME: true
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: calculate monitoring end date of previous period

BRANCH.COMMENT: --- Insert Previous Period into DB if not null ---

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: --- Check how many new future periods have to be created and create them ---

MAP.COMMENT: subtract size of data from futurePeriodCount

MAP.NAME: futurePeriodCount<=0
MAP.COMMENT: --- Do Nothing, Future periods already available in periods table ---

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: --- All Future periods not available in DB ---

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: get the largest number from string list

--- Create a list of all Future periods ---

MAP.COMMENT: --- Append the newly inserted periods into FutureChallengePeriods List ---

BRANCH.COMMENT: --- Check if Progression is TRUE ---

MAP.COMMENT: --- Do Nothing --- Current Period remains the same ---

SEQUENCE.NAME: $default

BRANCH.COMMENT: --- Check pastPeriod1 status and Map Y/N ---

MAP.NAME: /(?i)^COMPLETE/
MAP.COMMENT: --- Map Y if status is COMPLETE* ---

BRANCH.NAME: $default
BRANCH.COMMENT: --- Period not in Completed Status ---
--- Check pastPeriod2 status and Map Y/N ---

MAP.NAME: /(?i)^COMPLETE/
MAP.COMMENT: --- Map Y if status is COMPLETE* ---

BRANCH.NAME: $default
BRANCH.COMMENT: --- Period not in Completed Status ---
--- Check pastPeriod3 status and Map Y/N ---

MAP.NAME: /(?i)^COMPLETE/
MAP.COMMENT: --- Map Y if status is COMPLETE* ---

BRANCH.NAME: $default
BRANCH.COMMENT: --- Period not in Completed Status ---
--- Check currentPeriod status and Map Y/N ---

MAP.NAME: /(?i)^COMPLETE/
MAP.COMMENT: --- Map Y if status is COMPLETE* ---

BRANCH.NAME: $default
BRANCH.COMMENT: --- Period not in Completed Status ---
--- Check if consecutive flag is not empty or null ---

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: --- Get pointsProgression, min/max and limit counts from Bussiness Rules ---

MAP.COMMENT: --- find positive, negative or zero progression ---

BRANCH.COMMENT: --- Check if updation is required or not ---
--- Check Progression Limit Count ---

MAP.NAME: $default
MAP.COMMENT: --- No Progression Limit Count so updationReq is True ---

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: --- Check target value of current and 1 past period is same ---

BRANCH.COMMENT: -- compare target values ---

MAP.NAME: %challengePeriods/periodTargetValue% == %pastPeriod3/periodTargetValue%
MAP.COMMENT: --- target values are same so updationRequired is true ---

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: --- Check target value of current and 2 past periods is same ---

BRANCH.COMMENT: -- compare target values ---

MAP.NAME: %challengePeriods/periodTargetValue% == %pastPeriod3/periodTargetValue% && %challengePeriods/periodTargetValue% == %pastPeriod2/periodTargetValue%
MAP.COMMENT: --- target values are same so updationRequired is true ---

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: --- Check target value of current and 3 past periods is same ---

BRANCH.COMMENT: -- compare target values ---

MAP.NAME: %challengePeriods/periodTargetValue% == %pastPeriod3/periodTargetValue% && %challengePeriods/periodTargetValue% == %pastPeriod2/periodTargetValue% && %challengePeriods/periodTargetValue% == %pastPeriod1/periodTargetValue%
MAP.COMMENT: --- target values are same so updationRequired is true ---

BRANCH.COMMENT: --- Check Progression Limit Count ---

MAP.NAME: $default
MAP.COMMENT: --- No Progression Limit Count so updationReq is True ---

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: --- Check target value of current and 1 past period is same ---

BRANCH.COMMENT: -- compare target values ---

MAP.NAME: %challengePeriods/periodTargetValue% == %pastPeriod3/periodTargetValue%
MAP.COMMENT: --- target values are same so updationRequired is true ---

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: --- Check target value of current and 2 past periods is same ---

BRANCH.COMMENT: -- compare target values ---

MAP.NAME: %challengePeriods/periodTargetValue% == %pastPeriod3/periodTargetValue% && %challengePeriods/periodTargetValue% == %pastPeriod2/periodTargetValue%
MAP.COMMENT: --- target values are same so updationRequired is true ---

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: --- Check target value of current and 3 past periods is same ---

BRANCH.COMMENT: -- compare target values ---

MAP.NAME: %challengePeriods/periodTargetValue% == %pastPeriod3/periodTargetValue% && %challengePeriods/periodTargetValue% == %pastPeriod2/periodTargetValue% && %challengePeriods/periodTargetValue% == %pastPeriod1/periodTargetValue%
MAP.COMMENT: --- target values are same so updationRequired is true ---

MAP.NAME: $default
MAP.COMMENT: --- Zero Progression so updationRequired is false---

BRANCH.COMMENT: --- Calculate progressPeriodTargetValue based on updationRequired and min/max values ---

MAP.NAME: $default
MAP.COMMENT: --- No updation required so Map current periodTargetValue to progressPeriodTargetValue ---

MAP.NAME: $default
MAP.COMMENT: --- No consecutiveFlag so Map current periodTargetValue to progressPeriodTargetValue ---

BRANCH.COMMENT: --- Check if minimumTarget value is reached ---

MAP.NAME: %progressPeriodTargetValue% < %minimumTarget%
MAP.COMMENT: --- If less than min value set to min ---

BRANCH.COMMENT: --- Check if maximumTarget value is reached ---

MAP.NAME: %progressPeriodTargetValue% > %maximumTarget%
MAP.COMMENT: --- If greater than max value set to max ---

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: --- Update the target value in future period ---

BRANCH.COMMENT: --- Check status of api call ---

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

MAP.COMMENT: --- Save the current Period as the previous period for next iteration ---
